window_summary: This window tracks the recent apache/superset release stream from version 4.1.2 through 6.1.0, including release candidates and Helm chart releases. It captures major milestones such as the 5.0.0 and 6.0.0 releases with their UX and performance improvements, as well as the introduction of new packaging in 6.1.0.

chunks.title: 5.0.0rc1
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: apache/superset
Release: 5.0.0rc1
Tag: 5.0.0rc1; draft: False; prerelease: True; published_at: 2025-02-04T19:04:37Z; created_at: 2025-02-04T17:00:05Z
Release notes:
Hello Superset Community,
This is a call for the vote to release Apache Superset version 5.0.0.
The release candidate:
https://dist.apache.org/repos/dist/dev/superset/5.0.0rc1/
The Git tag for the release:
https://github.com/apache/superset/tree/5.0.0rc1
The CHANGELOG for the release:
https://github.com/apache/superset/blob/5.0.0rc1/CHANGELOG/5.0.0.md
The instructions for updating to the release:
https://github.com/apache/superset/blob/5.0.0rc1/UPDATING.md
Public keys are available at:
https://www.apache.org/dist/superset/KEYS
The vote will be left open until at least 72 hours have passed
and the necessary number of votes (3) have been reached.
Please vote accordingly:
[ ] +1 approve
[ ] +0 no opinion
[ ] -1 disapprove with the reason
Thanks,
The Apache Superset Team
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the apache/superset release 5.0.0rc1, the Apache Superset team issued a call for a vote to release version 5.0.0. This release candidate provides links to the distribution, Git tag, changelog, and updating instructions, and the vote remains open for at least 72 hours or until three votes are reached.

chunks.title: 5.0.0rc2
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: apache/superset
Release: 5.0.0rc2
Tag: 5.0.0rc2; draft: False; prerelease: True; published_at: 2025-04-01T13:53:02Z; created_at: 2025-04-01T13:00:24Z
Release notes:
# Apache Superset 5.0 Release Notes
We are thrilled to announce the release of Apache Superset 5.0, a major milestone that brings substantial improvements across the entire platform. This version delivers significant UX enhancements, performance optimizations, expanded database connectivity, and modernized data exploration capabilities. Built upon months of collaborative work, Superset 5.0 represents our commitment to providing an intuitive, powerful, and flexible data visualization and exploration platform that meets the needs of organizations of all sizes.
## Numerous UX Improvements in Key Areas
Superset 5.0 brings substantial UX enhancements to elevate your data exploration experience:
- Better filter experience with improved filter bar accessibility ([#30812](https://github.com/apache/superset/pull/30812)) and UI refinements ([#31449](https://github.com/apache/superset/pull/31449), [#31279](https://github.com/apache/superset/pull/31279))
- Improved SQL Lab with a refreshed query history pane ([#31316](https://github.com/apache/superset/pull/31316)) and enhanced table metadata UI ([#29900](https://github.com/apache/superset/pull/29900))
- Enhanced table data interaction with selection and copying capability in SQL Lab and dataset view ([#31602](https://github.com/apache/superset/pull/31602))
- Upgraded Modal ([#31420](https://github.com/apache/superset/pull/31420)), Button ([#31623](https://github.com/apache/superset/pull/31623)), List ([#30963](https://github.com/apache/superset/pull/30963)), Avatar ([#30740](https://github.com/apache/superset/pull/30740)), Input ([#30730](https://github.com/apache/superset/pull/30730)), Switch ([#30731](https://github.com/apache/superset/pull/30731)) and other core UI components to Ant Design 5
- Redesigned labels system for better organization and discoverability ([#31575](https://github.com/apache/superset/pull/31575))
## Frontend Performance Improvements
Major optimizations to improve dashboard load times and overall responsiveness:
- Lazy loading of heavy components like React Ace ([#29796](https://github.com/apache/superset/pull/29796)), moment-timezone ([#29791](https://github.com/apache/superset/pull/29791)), and rehype-raw ([#29855](https://github.com/apache/superset/pull/29855))
- Migrated to React 17 ([#31961](https://github.com/apache/superset/pull/31961)) and TypeScript 5 ([#31979](https://github.com/apache/superset/pull/31979)) for improved performance and type safety
- Implemented tree shaking for Ant Design icons ([#29787](https://github.com/apache/superset/pull/29787)) to reduce bundle size
- Optimized dashboard components ([#31240](https://github.com/apache/superset/pull/31240), [#31241](https://github.com/apache/superset/pull/31241), [#31242](https://github.com/apache/superset/pull/31242)) to reduce unnecessary re-renders
- Improved state management for native filters and cross filters ([#31243](https://github.com/apache/superset/pull/31243))
- Replaced Moment.js with the lighter DayJS library ([#31310](https://github.com/apache/superset/pull/31310))
## Database Connectivity Enhancements
- Improved OAuth2 support for database connections ([#30674](https://github.com/apache/superset/pull/30674), [#30126](https://github.com/apache/superset/pull/30126), [#30082](https://github.com/apache/superset/pull/30082), [#30071](https://github.com/apache/superset/pull/30071)), including BigQuery, Trino, and Firebolt
- Enhanced database engine specifications with additional time grains for Trino and Presto ([#30926](https://github.com/apache/superset/pull/30926)) and PostgreSQL ([#30325](https://github.com/apache/superset/pull/30325))
- Better authentication with user impersonation support for StarRocks ([#28110](https://github.com/apache/superset/pull/28110))
- Added connectors for YDB ([#31141](https://git...
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the apache/superset release 5.0.0rc2, the release notes announce Apache Superset 5.0 as a major milestone with substantial UX enhancements including improved filter bar accessibility, refreshed SQL Lab query history pane, enhanced table data interaction, upgraded UI components to Ant Design 5, and a redesigned labels system. Frontend performance improvements include lazy loading of heavy components, migration to React 17 and TypeScript 5, tree shaking for Ant Design icons, optimized dashboard components, improved state management for filters, and replacement of Moment.js with DayJS. Database connectivity enhancements include improved OAuth2 support for BigQuery, Trino, and Firebolt, additional time grains for Trino, Presto, and PostgreSQL, user impersonation support for StarRocks, and new connectors for YDB.

Release: 6.0.0
Tag: 6.0.0; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2025-12-18T18:18:13Z; created_at: 2025-12-04T18:55:36Z
Release notes:
Hello Community,
The Apache Superset team is pleased to announce that Superset
6.0.0 has just been released.
Apache Superset is a modern, enterprise-ready business intelligence web application.
The official source release:
https://downloads.apache.org/superset/6.0.0
The PyPI package:
https://pypi.org/project/apache_superset/6.0.0
The CHANGELOG for the release:
https://github.com/apache/superset/blob/6.0.0/CHANGELOG/6.0.0.md
The instructions for updating to the release:
https://github.com/apache/superset/blob/6.0.0/UPDATING.md
If you have any usage questions or have problems when upgrading or
find any issues with enhancements included in this release, please
don't hesitate to let us know by sending feedback to this mailing
list.

questions.query_text: In the apache/superset releases, which release note describes the migration to React 17 and TypeScript 5 as part of frontend performance improvements?

answer_support.answer_text: Migrated to React 17 and TypeScript 5 for improved performance and type safety

questions.query_text: Across the apache/superset releases, how does the content of the release note for 6.1.0rc1 differ from the release note for 6.0.0rc1?

options.text: 6.1.0rc1 includes new NPM and PyPI packages, while 6.0.0rc1 does not mention any such packages.
6.1.0rc1 describes UX improvements, while 6.0.0rc1 describes database connectivity enhancements.
6.1.0rc1 announces the general availability of Superset 6.1.0, while 6.0.0rc1 is a vote call for 6.0.0.
6.1.0rc1 provides links to the changelog, while 6.0.0rc1 does not.

questions.expected_answer: 6.1.0rc1 includes new NPM and PyPI packages, while 6.0.0rc1 does not mention any such packages.

answer_support.answer_text: also includes new NPM and PyPI packages: @apache-superset/core v0.1.0-rc1, apache-superset-core 0.1.0rc1, and apache-superset-extensions-cli 0.1.0rc1
This release candidate provides links to the distribution, Git tag, changelog, and updating instructions

questions.query_text: In the apache/superset release window, order the following release-content states from earliest to latest: (1) a release candidate that calls for a vote on version 4.1.2, (2) a release that announces the general availability of version 5.0.0, (3) a release candidate that includes new NPM and PyPI packages for version 6.1.0.

answer_support.answer_text: call for the vote to release Apache Superset version 4.1.2
call for the vote to release Apache Superset version 6.1.0 ... includes new NPM and PyPI packages
